app.name: DeepSeek-TUI
app.one_liner: A terminal-native coding agent for DeepSeek V4 models with 1M-token context, real-time reasoning visualization, and full tool-use capabilities.

screens.name: Main Agent Interface
screens.purpose: Primary screen for task input, real-time reasoning display, tool execution logs, and interaction mode control.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Checkpoint and resume long sessions by saving agent state and workspace context.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add file read/write and shell execution tools with approval gating
week 1: Implement core TUI loop with task input and reasoning stream display
week 1: Integrate DeepSeek V4 API with 1M-token context handling
acceptance_tests: In Agent mode, all shell and file mutation commands require explicit user approval before execution.
User can launch the TUI, authenticate via DeepSeek API key, and submit a coding task that triggers real-time chain-of-thought rendering.
